findings.issue: Hardcoded Windows user path 'C:\Users\conor\jarvis' embeds personal machine configuration in version control
findings.suggestion: Use relative paths or environment variable like process.env.JARVIS_HOME to support deployment across environments
findings.est_impact: Deployment failures on non-Windows systems or different user accounts; breaks CI/CD portability

findings.issue: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var repeated identically across all three app configs
findings.suggestion: Define env vars once at root level or use a shared config object to reduce repetition
findings.est_impact: Maintenance burden; increased chance of inconsistent updates

findings.issue: restart_delay: 3000 set inconsistently—jarvis-intraday lacks this setting entirely
findings.suggestion: Standardize restart_delay across all apps or document why intraday needs different behavior
findings.est_impact: Unpredictable restart behavior; harder to troubleshoot restart loops
